description: Writer is an enterprise AI platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents and related applications. Its products include AI Studio, APIs for model inference and knowledge features, and the Writer Framework for building apps.
summary: Writer exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at https://api.writer.com/v1 and a Python-based `writer` CLI for Writer Framework deployment; I found no public GraphQL API or first-party MCP server endpoint for developers to call.
